label: account.move

campaign_id.name: campaign_id
campaign_id.help_text: This is a name that helps you keep track of your different campaign efforts, e.g. Fall_Drive, Christmas_Special

source_id.name: source_id
source_id.help_text: This is the source of the link, e.g. Search Engine, another domain, or name of email list

medium_id.name: medium_id
medium_id.help_text: This is the method of delivery, e.g. Postcard, Email, or Banner Ad

activity_state.name: activity_state
activity_state.help_text:
Status based on activities
Overdue: Due date is already passed
Today: Activity date is today
Planned: Future activities.

activity_exception_decoration.name: activity_exception_decoration
activity_exception_decoration.help_text: Type of the exception activity on record.

activity_exception_icon.name: activity_exception_icon
activity_exception_icon.help_text: Icon to indicate an exception activity.

message_needaction.name: message_needaction
message_needaction.help_text: If checked, new messages require your attention.

message_has_error.name: message_has_error
message_has_error.help_text: If checked, some messages have a delivery error.

message_has_error_counter.name: message_has_error_counter
message_has_error_counter.help_text: Number of messages with delivery error

message_has_sms_error.name: message_has_sms_error
message_has_sms_error.help_text: If checked, some messages have a delivery error.

reconciled_payment_ids.name: reconciled_payment_ids
reconciled_payment_ids.help_text: Payments that have been reconciled with this invoice.

tax_cash_basis_origin_move_id.name: tax_cash_basis_origin_move_id
tax_cash_basis_origin_move_id.help_text: The journal entry from which this tax cash basis journal entry has been created.

tax_cash_basis_created_move_ids.name: tax_cash_basis_created_move_ids
tax_cash_basis_created_move_ids.help_text: The cash basis entries created from the taxes on this entry, when reconciling its lines.

auto_post.name: auto_post
auto_post.help_text: Specify whether this entry is posted automatically on its accounting date, and any similar recurring invoices.

auto_post_until.name: auto_post_until
auto_post_until.help_text: This recurring move will be posted up to and including this date.

checked.name: checked
checked.help_text: If this checkbox is not ticked, it means that the user was not sure of all the related information at the time of the creation of the move and that the move needs to be checked again.

country_code.name: country_code
country_code.help_text:
The ISO country code in two chars. 
You can use this field for quick search.

company_price_include.name: company_price_include
company_price_include.help_text: Default on whether the sales price used on the product and invoices with this Company includes its taxes.

restrict_mode_hash_table.name: restrict_mode_hash_table
restrict_mode_hash_table.help_text: If ticked, when an entry is posted, we retroactively hash all moves in the sequence from the entry back to the last hashed entry. The hash can also be performed on demand by the Secure Entries wizard.

secured.name: secured
secured.help_text: The entry is secured with an inalterable hash.

partner_shipping_id.name: partner_shipping_id
partner_shipping_id.help_text: The delivery address will be used in the computation of the fiscal position.

partner_bank_id.name: partner_bank_id
partner_bank_id.help_text: Bank Account Number to which the invoice will be paid. A Company bank account if this is a Customer Invoice or Vendor Credit Note, otherwise a Partner bank account number.

fiscal_position_id.name: fiscal_position_id
fiscal_position_id.help_text: Fiscal positions are used to adapt taxes and accounts for particular customers or sales orders/invoices. The default value comes from the customer.

payment_reference.name: payment_reference
payment_reference.help_text: The payment reference to set on journal items.

qr_code_method.name: qr_code_method
qr_code_method.help_text: Type of QR-code to be generated for the payment of this invoice, when printing it. If left blank, the first available and usable method will be used.

invoice_currency_rate.name: invoice_currency_rate
invoice_currency_rate.help_text: Currency rate from company currency to document currency.

direction_sign.name: direction_sign
direction_sign.help_text: Multiplicator depending on the document type, to convert a price into a balance

tax_totals.name: tax_totals
tax_totals.help_text: Edit Tax amounts if you encounter rounding issues.

quick_edit_total_amount.name: quick_edit_total_amount
quick_edit_total_amount.help_text:
Use this field to encode the total amount of the invoice.
Odoo will automatically create one invoice line with default values to match it.

is_move_sent.name: is_move_sent
is_move_sent.help_text: It indicates that the invoice/payment has been sent or the PDF has been generated.

is_being_sent.name: is_being_sent
is_being_sent.help_text: Is the move being sent asynchronously

invoice_origin.name: invoice_origin
invoice_origin.help_text: The document(s) that generated the invoice.

invoice_incoterm_id.name: invoice_incoterm_id
invoice_incoterm_id.help_text: International Commercial Terms are a series of predefined commercial terms used in international transactions.

invoice_cash_rounding_id.name: invoice_cash_rounding_id
invoice_cash_rounding_id.help_text: Defines the smallest coinage of the currency that can be used to pay by cash.

bank_partner_id.name: bank_partner_id
bank_partner_id.help_text: Technical field to get the domain on the bank

deferred_move_ids.name: deferred_move_ids
deferred_move_ids.help_text: The deferred entries created by this invoice

deferred_original_move_ids.name: deferred_original_move_ids
deferred_original_move_ids.help_text: The original invoices that created the deferred entries

edi_state.name: edi_state
edi_state.help_text: The aggregated state of all the EDIs with web-service of this move

edi_error_count.name: edi_error_count
edi_error_count.help_text: How many EDIs are in error for this move?

purchase_vendor_bill_id.name: purchase_vendor_bill_id
purchase_vendor_bill_id.help_text: Auto-complete from a past bill / purchase order.

purchase_id.name: purchase_id
purchase_id.help_text: Auto-complete from a past purchase order.

asset_depreciation_beginning_date.name: asset_depreciation_beginning_date
asset_depreciation_beginning_date.string: Date of the beginning of the depreciation

intrastat_country_id.name: intrastat_country_id
intrastat_country_id.help_text: Intrastat country, arrival for sales, dispatch for purchases

extract_state.name: extract_state
selection: waiting extraction, but it is not ready

extract_document_uuid.name: extract_document_uuid
extract_document_uuid.string: ID of the request to IAP-OCR

extract_can_show_send_button.name: extract_can_show_send_button
extract_can_show_send_button.string: Can show the ocr send button

suspense_statement_line_id.name: suspense_statement_line_id
suspense_statement_line_id.string: Request document from a bank statement line

generating_loan_line_id.name: generating_loan_line_id
generating_loan_line_id.help_text: Line of the loan that generated this entry

show_buy_invoice_button.name: show_buy_invoice_button
show_buy_invoice_button.help_text: Whether to show the buy invoice button

show_sell_invoice_button.name: show_sell_invoice_button
show_sell_invoice_button.help_text: Whether to show the sell invoice button

timesheet_total_duration.name: timesheet_total_duration
timesheet_total_duration.help_text: Total recorded duration, expressed in the encoding UoM, and rounded to the unit

workflow_hints:
- - **Sub-records**: After creating the parent record, create sub-records via the sub-model fields: line_ids, tax_cash_basis_created_move_ids, invoice_line_ids, reversal_move_ids, statement_line_ids, timesheet_ids. Always preview the parent first, then create sub-records in a second step.
- All required fields must be filled. Use preview action to check what's missing.
- partner_id is required — always confirm the customer/vendor before creating.
